---
title: "Public Seminar: Inequality Trends in Post-Pandemic Indonesia"
description: "New findings on income and consumption inequality dynamics in Indonesia since 2020."
date: "2026-04-15"
categories: [seminar, inequality]
author: "DEN Economics Lab"
---

The lab will host a public seminar on **inequality trends in post-pandemic
Indonesia**. We present new estimates of income and consumption inequality
constructed from SUSENAS panel data covering 2018–2025.

**Date.** 15 April 2026 · 14.00–16.00 WIB

**Speakers.** Krisna Gupta, Dinda Rachmania

**Venue.** Online (Zoom) — registration link forthcoming.

The seminar is part of an ongoing series on the welfare effects of the
post-pandemic adjustment. See the [research page](../../../research.qmd) for
related working papers.
